title: rosa acicularis var. subalpina
intro: Rosa acicularis var. subalpina, also known as the subalpine prickly rose, is a variety of rose plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rosa acicularis var. subalpina include reducing inflammation, promoting skin healing, and providing antioxidant properties. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, where it can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
